item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately rejects adding a standing entry verifier, recognizes the repeated pattern of manual gates across prior errors, and reframes the issue as a recurring source/process failure. It permits only a tightly bounded emergency check for the current batch, then requires upstream source analysis, system validation, field rules, auto-fill/defaults, and eventual removal or reassessment of temporary manual checking. This satisfies the anti-spiral brake rather than adding the next local repair."}
